name: axoniq-migration
description: Migrate applications from Axon Framework 4 to Axon Framework 5 / Axoniq Framework 5.

interface.shortDescription: Axon Framework 4 to Axoniq Framework 5 migration skills.
interface.longDescription: A curated Codex plugin for migrating applications from Axon Framework 4 to Axon Framework 5 / Axoniq Framework 5. It bundles the phased migration orchestrator, OpenRewrite recipe runner, and isolated-test helper.
defaultPrompt: Plan an Axon 4 to 5 migration for this repository.
Run the Axon 4 to 5 OpenRewrite migration.
Set up isolated tests for an Axon migration target.
